rationale: Control case. Dim1: output states misstatement_probability=30; control band p<=30 -> 2 (boundary value qualifies). Dim2/Dim3: null per rubric for control cases. Dim4: consistency rule satisfied (p=30 <40 with risk_tier='watch', allowed clear/watch, so no cap). Evidence is specific, not generic: exact values with accession numbers and periods (AR 43,495,000 FY2012 vs 97,460,000 FY2013 against Revenues 933,014,000 -> 909,674,000, accn 0001445305-14-005158; AllowanceForDoubtfulAccounts 2,466,000 FY2011 -> 514,000 FY2013; NI vs OCF pairs FY2011/FY2013/FY2014 e.g. 206,103,000 vs 361,547,000). The output coherently combines multi-year, multi-account data: AR/revenue divergence cross-checked against allowance coverage, offset by persistent OCF>NI as an earnings-quality positive, and the goodwill/intangibles jump (277.6M->315.8M; 63.7M->108.2M at Dec-2014) correctly attributed to a disclosed acquisition. The sole mechanism assertion on this control case is hedged, anchored to provided data, and self-assessed as immaterial (~$0.5M allowance vs ~$900M revenue), satisfying the 'mechanism assertions genuinely supported' requirement -> 3. Memorization condition 2: false — reasoning cites concrete provided data content throughout (not just document lists), and no post-cutoff facts (revelation/enforcement/outcome) appear; all referenced events fall within the provided filings through 2015-07-31.
